title: contact_set unknown-key check: as_object().into_iter().flatten() is unnecessarily opaque
description: The unknown-key check uses patch.as_object().into_iter().flatten() to iterate the patch map keys. By this point the code has already verified patch.is_object() and continued otherwise, so patch.as_object() is guaranteed Some. The indirect Option-into_iter-flatten pattern hides this invariant. Suggested rewrite: use patch.as_object().unwrap().keys() or extract let obj = patch.as_object().expect("checked above") at the top of the block. For whom: any contributor reading this code bottom-up will not immediately see why into_iter().flatten() is needed instead of a direct .iter().
